title: Mixed Archive ZIP Mini Fixture
capture_note: Checked-in ZIP probe for Story 205. It packages one maintained DOCX fixture, one maintained plain-text .eml fixture, one maintained static HTML snapshot, and one intentionally unsupported plain-text member so the first mixed-archive lane can prove archive-member manifesting, bounded suffix routing, nested driver launches, and explicit blocked outcomes without claiming generic archive support.

members.notes: The ZIP keeps only the HTML member so the bounded probe exercises one blocked unsupported file rather than counting an extra `.source.json` sidecar member.

members.source: repo-authored member embedded only in the ZIP fixture
members.notes: This unsupported text member exists to prove explicit blocked routing on the bounded mixed-archive slice.

supported_scope: suffix-based routing into existing maintained direct-entry recipes
explicit blocked rows for unsupported members
known_gaps: No PDF or grouped image-member routing
No nested archives or attachment extraction
No broad mixed-archive normalization into a single combined bundle
